payload.answer: SELECT statements are allowed in this mode, including `SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10`; `DELETE FROM memory_cards` is denied.
citations: Admin SQL select-only mode - SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed; DELETE FROM memory_cards denied

entity_resolution.reason: No durable entity should be created or updated from a transient access-control fixture.

repair_options: If you intended to modify data, switch out of select-only mode.
If you only need inspection, continue using SELECT queries.
If access should be broader, review the permission policy for memory_cards.
